title: quercus lowii
intro: Quercus lowii, also known as the Bornean oak, is a species of evergreen tree found in the mountainous regions of Borneo. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high tannin content. The health benefits of Quercus lowii include its ability to support cardiovascular health, improve cognitive function, and boost the immune system. Quercus lowii is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and bark are used in herbal preparations to create teas, tinctures, and supplements.
